contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: Fix Sophia per-thread concurrency race + build watch-and-notify capability
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/138
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/139
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/140
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/141
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/142
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/143
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/416
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/418
  
  Details:
  Two-part autopilot (Sophia) work, diagnosed live on prod and shipped end-to-end.
  
  (1) CONCURRENCY RACE: sending attachments/instructions into a Telegram topic while Sophia was mid-turn corrupted that topic's transcript (assistant tool_calls persisted without tool results -> DeepSeek 400 on every later reply -> topic permanently dead; bricked 'Stream of consciousness' + 'Digital Infrastructure'). Root cause: 10-thread adapter pool + uvicorn --workers 2 + an out-of-band append_to_transcript.py writer racing the per-topic transcript (last-writer-wins). Fixes: repaired the two bricked topics + restarted; self-healing sanitiser + atomic writes (never brick again); --workers 1 + per-session lock (one writer/executor per topic); locked the /chat streaming path; eliminated the cross-process writer (prep stays parallel, the turn is the single writer); adapter per-topic dispatch serialization; detailed per-turn completion reports; mid-task ack+queue; and a .gitignore fix so deploy.sh git-clean can't wipe Sophia's session memory.
  
  (2) WATCH-AND-NOTIFY: a chat turn is bounded (180s) and holds the per-topic lock, so Sophia cannot wait for a long async op (AMI/snapshot bake, instance boot, deploy) -> she was promising follow-ups nothing kept (proven: an AMI reached 'available' and she never reported). Built a generic detached-poller facility (watch_aws_resource / watch_url tools -> app/watch_runner.py) that outlives the turn, polls to a terminal state, and posts back to the originating topic. Caught + fixed an aws_query response-envelope bug via a live probe.
  
  Deployed to prod (targeted, no git clean) and verified: 1 worker, 0 dangling sessions, tools live, real AMI probe returns (done, available). Plans: agentic_ai_context/SOPHIA_THREAD_CONCURRENCY_PLAN.md + SOPHIA_WATCH_AND_NOTIFY_PLAN.md.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 400.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
